name: lp-svc-airflow
postCreateCommand: pipx install ruff && pipx install poetry && pipx install pip-audit && pipx install pre-commit && poetry config virtualenvs.in-project true --local && if [ -f .pre-commit-config.yaml ]; then pre-commit install; fi
postStartCommand: poetry config virtualenvs.in-project true --local && poetry install --no-interaction
